title: Fix deployment error from Version 5

requirements.text: Diagnose and resolve the deployment error that occurred during Version 5 production launch, ensuring the Stripe payment integration deploys successfully

quotes: 🙏 Go live encountered an issue: Deployment error

acceptanceCriteria: Version 5 deploys successfully to production without errors
All Stripe payment integration features remain functional after deployment
Backend actor compiles and initializes correctly on the network

constraints: Preserve all existing Stripe payment integration functionality
Maintain backward compatibility with existing cart and order data
